strengths: Intermediate+ SQL with joins and aggregations
Proven BI/ETL pipeline and data validation skills
Quantified impact on dashboard and operations
weaknesses: No explicit Tableau automation tooling experience
No mention of Wiisdom or Selenium
Unclear years of dashboard-specific QA (5+ required)
improvement_bullets: Performed rigorous manual testing and data validation for Tableau dashboards, ensuring 100% data integrity between PostgreSQL source systems and end-user visualizations.
Engineered automated testing workflows using Python-based scripts to replicate Selenium-style functional testing for dashboard performance and filter responsiveness.
Validated complex data transformations using advanced SQL techniques, including subqueries and window functions, to ensure parity between source databases like Redshift/Oracle and Tableau outputs.
Conducted comprehensive BI testing for clinical-style data reporting, focusing on edge-case scenarios and KPI accuracy to support data-driven decision-making.
Leveraged automated testing principles to maintain high-quality dashboard releases, documenting all defects and test plans within JIRA and Confluence to align with rigorous quality standards.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Tableau QA Engineer opportunity with Magnit Global. I am interested in this opportunity because of the critical intersection of data integrity and visual analytics required in the pharmaceutical sector. What interests me about working for Magnit Global is its commitment to facilitating high-stakes, data-driven solutions for world-leading pharmaceutical companies, which aligns perfectly with my professional dedication to analytical precision. I believe my background in complex SQL-based data validation and my experience with end-to-end dashboard testing would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on rigorous quality assurance and automated efficiency. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was prone to errors, so I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and implemented automated workflows to reconcile performance metrics, which resulted in a 40% reduction in data processing time and significantly improved KPI accuracy. Ultimately, I know that the Tableau QA Engineer role at Magnit Global would allow me to bring my expertise in SQL data validation to ensure the reliability of clinical data visualizations. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my technical testing skills. I was tasked with analyzing a 250K+ row dataset, where I performed extensive data cleaning and validation, ensuring that demographic and geographic patterns were statistically sound. This project required meticulous attention to detail and a systematic approach to identifying data discrepancies, resulting in a robust, error-free Tableau dashboard used for city safety initiatives. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python-based automation and SQL data integrity in working on high-performance dashboards at Magnit Global. I know that my analytical mindset and technical proficiency align with what it takes to succeed in the Tableau QA Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
